A 2D plumber made of paper uses a hammer and turn-based combat to fight enemies on a theater stage.
A beloved remake where your captured monster actually walks behind you as you explore the region.
A sports star gets transported to a magical world, fights a giant whale monster, and awkwardly laughs on a balcony.
A gritty detective game where a fairy tale sheriff investigates murders in a neon-lit New York City.
Trapped on an island with all my worst enemies, using stealth and gadgets to survive while a clown mocks me over the intercom.
A teenage superhero with electric venom powers swings through a snowy New York City during the holidays.
I started the game hanging off a train dangling over a snowy cliff, and it only got crazier from there.
Trying to navigate ancient ruins with a giant, feathered dog-bird creature that rarely listens to my commands.
I spent an entire day driving a forklift and asking people in a Japanese town if they saw a black car.
A gangster with crazy hair fights enemies in turn-based RPG combat using a baseball bat and pigeons.
I moved to a rural town, made friends, and investigated murders by jumping into televisions.
Inherited a farm, spent all my time pulling weeds and giving gifts to villagers instead of actually growing crops.
I built a beautiful wildlife park, but then accidentally deleted a fence and the lions got out.
I carefully zoned residential and commercial areas, then spawned an alien invasion just to watch my city burn.
I started as a microscopic cell, evolved into a creature with five legs, and eventually built a spaceship.
